---
title: "Fan Yin"
image: files/photo.jpg
about: 
  template: solana
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 15rem
---

I am a PhD student at the [Berlin School of Economics](https://berlinschoolofeconomics.de "Berlin School of Economics") and Humboldt University. I obtained my Master's (Economics) and Bachelor's (Sociology) studies in University of Heidelberg.
My interests are in spatial economics, urban economics, and economic history. 

If you'd like to chat or grab a coffee, feel free to reach out anytime!

---

**Contact**   
Fan Yin  
Humboldt-Universität zu Berlin
Chair of Econometrics
Spandauer Straße 1
10178 Berlin  

E-Mail: [fan.yin@hu-berlin.de](mailto:fan.yin@hu-berlin.de)
